problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
